PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-14-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Franchesca Callejo, Esq., for Beverly Gipson, Petitioner.

The subject matters are discussed. The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Aug-21-2022 is admitted to probate. Karan Gartner is appointed Administrator With Will Annexed with full authority. Bond is set at $300,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-17-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

The Verified Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-17-2023 Continued To Sep-18-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Robert Roddick appearing via zoom for Gilane Balgos (Petitioner).
Franchesca Callejo appearing via zoom for Beverly Gipson (Objector).

Discussion was held counsel stated that they are on the same page, that they will meet and confer, and that they agree on pro-bono mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than August 28, 2023. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by September 11, 2023. The Petition for Probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to September 18, 2023 and the Parties are to return on September 18, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.
